title: KV4T8-i sublight engine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''KV4T8-i sublight engine''' was a [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight drive]] produced by [[Keizar-Volvec/Legends|Keizar-Volvec]]. KV4T8-i engines were installed on [[KR-TB "Doomtreader"]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] such as ''[[Hell's Anvil]]'', owned by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Montross (bounty hunter)|Montross]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2002-11-26 -->[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Bounty Hunter'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]
